# 4-anos-da-Elo-
Repositório de aniversário 
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1,user-scalable=no">
<title>🎀 Festa da Eloá — 4 Aninhos!</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bubblegum+Sans&family=Nunito:wght@400;700;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
:root{--red:#d91a35;--dark:#a81228;--pink:#f97fb0;--bg:#fff5f7}
html,body{font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);overflow-x:hidden}
.screen{display:none;min-height:100vh;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding-bottom:60px;animation:fup .4s ease}
.screen.active{display:flex}
@keyframes fup{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.polka{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;
  background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#d91a3522 1.5px,transparent 1.5px);
  background-size:28px 28px}

/* S1 */
#s1{justify-content:center;align-items:center;text-align:center;padding:40px 28px;gap:14px;z-index:1;position:relative;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#fff 0%,#ffe0e8 100%)}
.bow{font-size:5.5rem;animation:bowA 2s ease-in-out infinite;display:inline-block}
@keyframes bowA{0%,100%{transform:rotate(-6deg)scale(1)}50%{transform:rotate(6deg)scale(1.1)}}
.s1t{font-family:‘Bubblegum Sans’,cursive;font-size:2rem;color:var(–red);line-height:1.2}
.s1s{font-size:.9rem;color:#bbb;font-weight:700}
.btn-ab{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(–red),var(–dark));color:#fff;font-family:‘Bubblegum Sans’,cursive;font-size:1.3rem;border:none;border-radius:50px;padding:17px 46px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 7px 0 var(–dark),0 12px 30px rgba(217,26,53,.4);transition:transform .15s,box-shadow .15s}
.btn-ab:active{transform:translateY(4px);box-shadow:0 3px 0 var(–dark)}

/* S2 */
#s2{background:#111;justify-content:flex-start;padding:0;overflow:hidden}
.gtop{width:100%;padding:12px 16px 8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;z-index:10;position:relative}
.gttl{font-family:‘Bubblegum Sans’,cursive;font-size:1rem;color:#fff}
.gsco{color:#FFD700;font-weight:900;font-size:1.2rem}
.gbar-w{width:100%;padding:0 16px 6px;z-index:10;position:relative}
.gbar-bg{height:10px;background:#222;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden}
.gbar-f{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(–red),var(–pink));border-radius:10px;width:0%;transition:width .3s}
.gbar-l{font-size:.65rem;color:#555;text-align:right;margin-top:3px;font-weight:700}
#gc{display:block;width:100%;touch-action:none}
.ghint{position:absolute;bottom:16px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:#fff;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;padding:8px 20px;border-radius:50px;white-space:nowrap;z-index:10;animation:pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.6}50%{opacity:1}}
.mnote{position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;font-size:1.1rem;z-index:11;opacity:.6;animation:nf 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;pointer-events:none}
@keyframes nf{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)rotate(-10deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-5px)rotate(10deg)}}

/* S3 */
#s3{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#1a1a1a 0%,#2d0812 100%);justify-content:flex-start;padding:0;overflow:hidden;position:relative}
.stars{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;overflow:hidden}
.str{position:absolute;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;animation:twk linear infinite}
@keyframes twk{0%,100%{opacity:.04}50%{opacity:.5}}
.stage{width:100%;flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:16px 18px 8px;position:relative;z-index:2}
.cwrap{width:100%;max-width:380px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:12px}
.cphoto{width:130px;height:155px;border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);box-shadow:0 0 28px rgba(217,26,53,.55);animation:idle 3.5s ease-in-out infinite;flex-shrink:0}
@keyframes idle{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)rotate(-1.5deg)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)rotate(1.5deg)}}
.cphoto.talk{animation:talk .35s ease-in-out infinite alternate}
@keyframes talk{from{transform:scale(1)rotate(-1.5deg)}to{transform:scale(1.07)rotate(1.5deg)}}
.cphoto img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top}
.bub{background:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:15px 18px;width:100%;box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.28);position:relative;opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px);transition:opacity .4s,transform .4s}
.bub.show{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.bub::before{content:’’;position:absolute;top:-12px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);border:12px solid transparent;border-top:0;border-bottom-color:#fff}
.bn{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:4px}
.bn.mi{color:var(–red)}.bn.mk{color:#777}.bn.bo{color:#b8860b}
.bt{font-size:.9rem;color:#333;line-height:1.55;font-weight:600}
.bt .hl{color:var(–red);font-weight:900}
.bfoot{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-top:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.wave{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;height:14px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}
.wave.on{opacity:1}
.wb{width:3px;background:var(–red);border-radius:3px;animation:wv .7s ease-in-out infinite}
.wb:nth-child(1){height:5px;animation-delay:0s}.wb:nth-child(2){height:11px;animation-delay:.1s}
.wb:nth-child(3){height:15px;animation-delay:.2s}.wb:nth-child(4){height:8px;animation-delay:.3s}
.wb:nth-child(5){height:12px;animation-delay:.15s}
@keyframes wv{0%,100%{transform:scaleY(.3)}50%{transform:scaleY(1)}}
.btn-replay{background:rgba(217,26,53,.85);border:none;border-radius:50px;color:#fff;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:900;padding:6px 12px;cursor:pointer;font-family:‘Nunito’,sans-serif;display:none}
.cfoot{width:100%;padding:12px 16px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;z-index:10}
.dots{display:flex;gap:7px}
.dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#333;transition:all .3s}
.dot.a{background:var(–red);transform:scale(1.35)}.dot.d{background:#555}
.btn-prox{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(–red),var(–dark));color:#fff;font-family:‘Bubblegum Sans’,cursive;font-size:.92rem;border:none;border-radius:50px;padding:12px 22px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 0 var(–dark);opacity:.3;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s,transform .15s}
.btn-prox.on{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
.btn-prox:active{transform:translateY(2px)}

/* S4 */
#s4{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#1a1a1a,#2d0812);justify-content:center;padding:28px 22px;gap:18px;text-align:center}
.qphoto{width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;border:3px solid var(–red);box-shadow:0 0 22px rgba(217,26,53,.5);margin:0 auto}
.qphoto img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top}
.qtit{font-family:‘Bubblegum Sans’,cursive;font-size:1.6rem;color:#fff;line-height:1.3}
.qtit span{color:#FFD700}
.qsub{font-size:.82rem;color:#777;font-weight:700}
.qopts{width:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px;max-width:320px}
.qo{background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 18px;color:#fff;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;transition:background .2s;font-family:‘Nunito’,sans-serif}
.qo:hover{background:rgba(217,26,53,.2);border-color:rgba(217,26,53,.5)}
.qo.ok{background:rgba(80,200,80,.15);border-color:#4caf50;animation:cpop .4s cubic-bezier(.36,1.6,.64,1)}
.qo.no{background:rgba(217,26,53,.25);border-color:var(–red);animation:shk .4s ease}
@keyframes cpop{from{transform:scale(.94)}to{transform:scale(1)}}
@keyframes shk{0%,100%{transform:none}25%{transform:translateX(-7px)}75%{transform:translateX(7px)}}
.qfb{font-family:‘Bubblegum Sans’,cursive;font-size:1.1rem;color:#fff;display:none;animation:fup .4s ease}
.qfb.on{display:block}

/* S5 */
#s5{background:var(–bg);justify-content:flex-start;padding:0 0 60px}
.rh{width:100%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(–red),var(–dark));padding:26px 20px 34px;text-align:center;border-radius:0 0 50% 50%/0 0 28px 28px;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(217,26,53,.4);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.rh::before{content:’’;position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%,rgba(255,255,255,.12),transparent 60%)}
.rh-bow{font-size:3rem;display:inline-block;animation:bowA 3s ease-in-out infinite}
.rh-tit{font-family:‘Bubblegum Sans’,cursive;font-size:1.9rem;color:#fff;line-height:1.2}
.rh-sub{font-size:.86rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);font-weight:700;margin-top:4px}
.rbody{width:100%;padding:18px 16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:13px}
.icard{width:100%;background:#fff;border-radius:18px;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.06);border:2px solid #ffd0da;overflow:hidden}
.ir{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;padding:12px 14px;border-bottom:1.5px dashed #ffd0da}
.ir:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.ii{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:11px;background:#fff0f4;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2rem;flex-shrink:0}
.il{font-size:.62rem;color:#ccc;font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}
.iv{font-weight:700;font-size:.86rem;color:#1a1a1a;margin-top:3px;line-height:1.5}
.iv a{color:var(–red);text-decoration:none}
.rform{width:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px}
.fl{font-size:.68rem;font-weight:900;color:#aaa;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;display:block;margin-bottom:4px}
.fi{width:100%;padding:12px 14px;border:2px solid #ffd0da;border-radius:12px;font-size:.9rem;font-family:‘Nunito’,sans-serif;background:#fff;color:#1a1a1a;outline:none}
.fi:focus{border-color:var(–red)}
.fsel{width:100%;padding:12px 14px;border:2px solid #ffd0da;border-radius:12px;font-size:.9rem;font-family:‘Nunito’,sans-serif;background:#fff;color:#1a1a1a;outline:none;appearance:none;cursor:pointer}
.fsel:focus{border-color:var(–red)}
.qrow{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center}
.qrow .fi{flex:1;text-align:center;font-weight:900;font-size:1.1rem}
.qb{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:11px;border:2px solid #ffd0da;background:#fff;font-size:1.3rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;font-weight:900}
.qb:active{background:#ffe0e8}
.btn-conf{width:100%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(–red),var(–dark));color:#fff;font-family:‘Bubblegum Sans’,cursive;font-size:1.2rem;border:none;border-radius:14px;padding:16px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 5px 0 var(–dark);margin-top:4px}
.btn-conf:active{transform:translateY(2px);box-shadow:0 3px 0 var(–dark)}

/* S6 */
#s6{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#1a1a1a,#2d0812);text-align:center;padding:40px 22px 60px;gap:15px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.cfw{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden}
.cp{position:absolute;border-radius:2px;animation:cfall linear infinite}
@keyframes cfall{0%{transform:translateY(-30px)rotate(0);opacity:1}100%{transform:translateY(110vh)rotate(720deg);opacity:.05}}
.ok-bow{font-size:5rem;animation:bowA 2s ease-in-out infinite}
.ok-tit{font-family:‘Bubblegum Sans’,cursive;font-size:2rem;color:#fff;text-shadow:3px 3px 0 var(–red);line-height:1.15}
.ok-nm{display:inline-block;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(–red),var(–pink));color:#fff;font-family:‘Bubblegum Sans’,cursive;font-size:1.3rem;padding:10px 26px;border-radius:50px;box-shadow:0 4px 0 var(–dark)}
.ok-msg{font-size:.86rem;color:#aaa;font-weight:700;line-height:1.6;max-width:300px}
.duo-c{width:130px;height:130px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;border:4px solid var(–red);box-shadow:0 0 28px rgba(217,26,53,.6);margin:0 auto}
.duo-c img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}
.gbox{width:100%;max-width:320px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border-radius:14px;padding:13px}
.gttl{font-size:.63rem;color:#555;font-weight:900;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;text-align:left;margin-bottom:8px}
.chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:7px}
.chip{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);color:#fff;font-size:.73rem;font-weight:700;padding:4px 11px;border-radius:50px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
.cdot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(–red)}
.btn-shr{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);color:#fff;font-family:‘Bubblegum Sans’,cursive;font-size:.95rem;border-radius:50px;padding:12px 28px;cursor:pointer}
.btn-shr:active{background:rgba(255,255,255,.15)}
</style>

</head>
<body>
<div class="polka"></div>

<div class="screen active" id="s1">
  <div class="bow">🎀</div>
  <h1 class="s1t">Você recebeu um<br>convite especial!</h1>
  <p class="s1s">✨ Toque para descobrir ✨</p>
  <button class="btn-ab" onclick="abrirConvite(this)">✨ Abrir Convite ✨</button>
</div>

<div class="screen" id="s2">
  <div class="gtop">
    <div class="gttl">🎀 Pegue só os laços!</div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px">
      <span style="font-size:.65rem;color:#555;font-weight:900">PONTOS</span>
      <span id="gsc" class="gsco">0</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="gbar-w">
    <div class="gbar-bg"><div class="gbar-f" id="gfill"></div></div>
    <div class="gbar-l" id="glbl">0 / 15 laços</div>
  </div>
  <canvas id="gc"></canvas>
  <div class="ghint" id="ghint">🎀 Toque nos laços para pegar!</div>
  <div class="mnote">🎵</div>
</div>

<div class="screen" id="s3">
  <div class="stars" id="starsEl"></div>
  <div class="stage">
    <div class="cwrap">
      <div class="cphoto" id="cphoto"><img id="cimg" src="" alt=""></div>
      <div class="bub" id="bub">
        <div class="bn" id="bn"></div>
        <div class="bt" id="bt"></div>
        <div class="bfoot">
          <div class="wave" id="wv">
            <div class="wb"></div><div class="wb"></div><div class="wb"></div>
            <div class="wb"></div><div class="wb"></div>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-replay" id="btnReplay" onclick="replayScene()">▶ Ouvir novamente</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="cfoot">
    <div class="dots" id="dots"></div>
    <button class="btn-prox" id="btnProx" onclick="nextScene()">Próximo ›</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="screen" id="s4">
  <div class="qphoto"><img id="qimg" src="" alt=""></div>
  <h2 class="qtit">Missão aceita!<br><span>Qual é o mês</span> da festa?</h2>
  <p class="qsub">👀 Pensa na dica da Mina!</p>
  <div class="qopts">
    <button class="qo" onclick="ans(this,false)">Março</button>
    <button class="qo" onclick="ans(this,true)">Maio</button>
    <button class="qo" onclick="ans(this,false)">Outubro</button>
  </div>
  <div class="qfb" id="qfb"></div>
</div>

<div class="screen" id="s5">
  <div class="rh">
    <div class="rh-bow">🎀</div>
    <h2 class="rh-tit">A festa da<br>Eloá te espera!</h2>
    <p class="rh-sub">Confirme sua presença 💕</p>
  </div>
  <div class="rbody">
    <div class="icard">
      <div class="ir"><div class="ii">🎂</div><div><div class="il">Aniversariante</div><div class="iv"><strong>Eloá</strong> — 4 aninhos! 🎀</div></div></div>
      <div class="ir"><div class="ii">📅</div><div><div class="il">Data &amp; Horário</div><div class="iv"><strong>02 de Maio de 2026</strong><br>Das 13h às 17h</div></div></div>
      <div class="ir"><div class="ii">📍</div><div><div class="il">Local</div><div class="iv"><strong>Buffet Serenata Kids</strong><br>R. Mônica Maria Hubacher Smith, 53<br>Vila Campesina — Osasco/SP<br><a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/dgY2cBxgSchGs8bH7" target="_blank">📌 Ver no mapa</a></div></div></div>
      <div class="ir"><div class="ii">🎀</div><div><div class="il">Tema</div><div class="iv"><strong>Minnie Vermelha</strong> com Mickey e Minnie! 🎊</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="rform">
      <div><label class="fl">Seu nome</label><input class="fi" id="fn" type="text" placeholder="Nome do responsável..."></div>
      <div><label class="fl">Nome da criança</label><input class="fi" id="cn" type="text" placeholder="Nome do amiguinho..."></div>
      <div><label class="fl">Quantas pessoas?</label>
        <div class="qrow"><button class="qb" onclick="cQty(-1)">−</button><input class="fi" id="qty" value="1" readonly><button class="qb" onclick="cQty(1)">+</button></div>
      </div>
      <div><label class="fl">Vai comparecer?</label>
        <select class="fsel" id="att">
          <option value="">Selecione...</option>
          <option value="sim">✅ Sim, com certeza!</option>
          <option value="talvez">🤔 Talvez...</option>
          <option value="nao">❌ Infelizmente não poderei</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div><label class="fl">Recado para a Eloá (opcional)</label><input class="fi" id="rmsg" type="text" placeholder="Ex: Parabéns Eloá! 🎉"></div>
      <button class="btn-conf" onclick="doRSVP()">🎊 Confirmar minha presença!</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="screen" id="s6">
  <div class="cfw" id="cfw"></div>
  <div class="ok-bow">🎀</div>
  <h2 class="ok-tit">Uhuu!<br>Presença confirmada!</h2>
  <div class="ok-nm" id="okNm"></div>
  <p class="ok-msg" id="okMsg"></p>
  <div class="duo-c"><img id="duoImg" src="" alt=""></div>
  <div class="gbox"><div class="gttl">🎈 Confirmados até agora</div><div class="chips" id="gchips"></div></div>
  <button class="btn-shr" onclick="shareIt()">📤 Compartilhar convite</button>
</div>

<script>
// ══════════════════════════════════════
// IMAGENS
// ══════════════════════════════════════
const IM={
  minnie:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',
  mickey:'data:image/jpeg;base64,',
  duo:'data:image/jpeg;base64,'
};
document.getElementById('qimg').src=IM.mickey;
document.getElementById('duoImg').src=IM.duo;

// ══════════════════════════════════════
// ÁUDIO — AudioContext + base64
// Estratégia: decodificar TUDO no primeiro clique
// e guardar os AudioBuffers prontos para tocar
// ══════════════════════════════════════
const B64={
  m1:'',m2:'',m3:'',m4:'',m5:'',
  n1:'',n2:'',n3:'',n4:''
};

let AC=null;                 // AudioContext
const BUF={};               // decoded AudioBuffers
let musicSrc=null;          // música atual
let charSrc=null;           // voz atual

// Converte base64 → ArrayBuffer
function b64ToAB(b64){
  const bin=atob(b64);
  const ab=new ArrayBuffer(bin.length);
  const view=new Uint8Array(ab);
  for(let i=0;i<bin.length;i++) view[i]=bin.charCodeAt(i);
  return ab;
}

// Decodifica todos os clips no AudioContext
async function preloadAll(){
  AC=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
  const keys=Object.keys(B64);
  await Promise.all(keys.map(async k=>{
    try{
      const ab=b64ToAB(B64[k]);
      BUF[k]=await AC.decodeAudioData(ab);
    }catch(e){ console.warn('decode error',k,e); }
  }));
  // Música gerada por Web Audio (não precisa de arquivo)
  BUF.music=makeMusicBuffer();
  console.log('✅ Áudios prontos:', Object.keys(BUF));
}

// Gera buffer de música (melodia simples)
function makeMusicBuffer(){
  const sr=AC.sampleRate, dur=12;
  const buf=AC.createBuffer(1,sr*dur,sr);
  const ch=buf.getChannelData(0);
  const notes=[
    [392,.5],[494,.5],[587,1],[523,.5],[494,.5],[440,1],
    [392,.5],[440,.5],[494,.5],[392,.5],[349,.5],[392,1],
    [294,.5],[349,.5],[392,1],[294,1.5]
  ];
  let pos=0;
  notes.forEach(([f,d])=>{
    const n=Math.floor(sr*d);
    for(let i=0;i<n&&pos<ch.length;i++,pos++){
      const t=i/sr;
      const env=Math.min(1,t/.03)*Math.min(1,(d-t)/.06);
      ch[pos]=env*.13*(Math.sin(2*Math.PI*f*t)+.2*Math.sin(4*Math.PI*f*t));
    }
  });
  return buf;
}

function playBuf(key,loop,vol,onEnd){
  if(!AC||!BUF[key]) return null;
  if(AC.state==='suspended') AC.resume();
  const src=AC.createBufferSource();
  const gain=AC.createGain();
  src.buffer=BUF[key];
  src.loop=loop||false;
  gain.gain.value=vol||1;
  src.connect(gain);
  gain.connect(AC.destination);
  src.start(0);
  if(onEnd) src.onended=onEnd;
  return {src,gain};
}

function stopNode(node){
  if(!node) return;
  try{ node.src.stop(); }catch(e){}
}

function startMusic(){
  stopNode(musicSrc);
  musicSrc=playBuf('music',true,.3);
}
function stopMusic(){
  stopNode(musicSrc); musicSrc=null;
}
function playChar(key,onEnd){
  stopNode(charSrc);
  charSrc=playBuf(key,false,.95,onEnd);
}
function stopChar(){
  stopNode(charSrc); charSrc=null;
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════
// ESTRELAS
// ══════════════════════════════════════
(()=>{
  const w=document.getElementById('starsEl');
  for(let i=0;i<50;i++){
    const s=document.createElement('div');s.className='str';
    const sz=1+Math.random()*2.5;
    s.style.cssText=`width:${sz}px;height:${sz}px;left:${Math.random()*100}%;top:${Math.random()*100}%;animation-duration:${2+Math.random()*4}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*5}s`;
    w.appendChild(s);
  }
})();

// ══════════════════════════════════════
// NAV
// ══════════════════════════════════════
function goTo(id){
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo(0,0);
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════
// ABRIR — 1ª interação do usuário
// ══════════════════════════════════════
async function abrirConvite(btn){
  btn.disabled=true;
  btn.textContent='🎀 Carregando...';
  await preloadAll();   // decodifica dentro do gesto → iOS/Android OK
  goTo('s2');
  setTimeout(()=>{
    resizeCanvas();
    gRunning=true;
    for(let i=0;i<5;i++) spawnItem();
    gameLoop();
    startMusic();
  },200);
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════
// MINI-JOGO
// ══════════════════════════════════════
const canvas=document.getElementById('gc');
const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
const GOAL=15;
let gScore=0,items=[],animId=null,gRunning=false;
const BOW='🎀';
const DECOYS=['⭐','❤️','🌟','💕','✨','🌸'];

function resizeCanvas(){
  canvas.width=canvas.parentElement.getBoundingClientRect().width;
  canvas.height=window.innerHeight-120;
}

function spawnItem(){
  const isBow=Math.random()<.62;
  items.push({
    x:32+Math.random()*(canvas.width-64),
    y:-40,vy:1.5+Math.random()*2.5,
    size:30+Math.random()*16,
    emoji:isBow?BOW:DECOYS[Math.floor(Math.random()*DECOYS.length)],
    bow:isBow,opacity:1,hit:false,scale:1,flash:0
  });
}

function gameLoop(){
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
  ctx.fillStyle='#0d0d0d';
  ctx.fillRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
  ctx.fillStyle='rgba(217,26,53,.055)';
  for(let x=0;x<canvas.width;x+=26)
    for(let y=0;y<canvas.height;y+=26){
      ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,3,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    }
  items.forEach((it,i)=>{
    if(it.hit){it.scale+=.1;it.opacity-=.09;if(it.opacity<=0){items.splice(i,1);return;}}
    else{it.y+=it.vy;if(it.flash>0)it.flash--;}
    ctx.save();ctx.globalAlpha=it.opacity;
    if(it.flash>0){ctx.shadowColor='#ff2222';ctx.shadowBlur=18;}
    ctx.font=`${it.size*it.scale}px serif`;
    ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.textBaseline='middle';
    ctx.fillText(it.emoji,it.x,it.y);
    ctx.restore();
    if(it.y>canvas.height+50)items.splice(i,1);
  });
  if(Math.random()<.025)spawnItem();
  animId=requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
}

function hitTest(x,y){
  for(let i=items.length-1;i>=0;i--){
    const it=items[i];if(it.hit)continue;
    const dx=x-it.x,dy=y-it.y;
    if(Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy)<it.size*1.1){
      if(it.bow){
        it.hit=true;gScore++;
        document.getElementById('gsc').textContent=gScore;
        document.getElementById('gfill').style.width=Math.min(gScore/GOAL*100,100)+'%';
        document.getElementById('glbl').textContent=`${Math.min(gScore,GOAL)} / ${GOAL} laços`;
        if(gScore>=GOAL)winGame();
      } else {
        it.flash=10;
      }
      return;
    }
  }
}
canvas.addEventListener('click',e=>{
  if(!gRunning)return;
  const r=canvas.getBoundingClientRect();hitTest(e.clientX-r.left,e.clientY-r.top);
});
canvas.addEventListener('touchstart',e=>{
  if(!gRunning)return;e.preventDefault();
  const r=canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  [...e.changedTouches].forEach(t=>hitTest(t.clientX-r.left,t.clientY-r.top));
},{passive:false});

function winGame(){
  gRunning=false;
  if(animId){cancelAnimationFrame(animId);animId=null;}
  stopMusic();
  document.getElementById('ghint').textContent='🎉 Arrasou! Abrindo o convite...';
  setTimeout(()=>startCinema(SC1,0),1200);
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════
// CENAS
// ══════════════════════════════════════
const SC1=[
  {img:IM.mickey,nc:'mk',nl:'🎩 Mickey Mouse',ak:'m1',
   html:'Ha-ha! Olá, amiguinho! Você sabe que dia está chegando? 🤔✨<br>Tem uma data <span class="hl">muuuito especial</span> vindo aí!'},
  {img:IM.minnie,nc:'mi',nl:'🎀 Mina',ak:'n1',
   html:'É o aniversário de uma princesinha muito querida…<br>a nossa amiga <span class="hl">Eloá!</span> 💖🎂'},
  {img:IM.mickey,nc:'mk',nl:'🎩 Mickey',ak:'m2',
   html:'E você foi escolhido para uma <span class="hl">missão super divertida!</span> 🕵️🎉<br>Será que você descobre quando vai ser a festa dela?'},
  {img:IM.minnie,nc:'mi',nl:'🎀 Mina',ak:'n2',next:'s4',
   html:'Vamos te dar uma dica… 👀<br>Vai ser no <span class="hl">mês mais florido e alegre</span> do ano! 🌸🌷'},
];
const SC2=[
  {img:IM.mickey,nc:'mk',nl:'🎩 Mickey',ak:'m3',
   html:'Isso mesmo! <span class="hl">Maio!</span> Ha-ha! 🎈<br>E sabe qual dia? O dia <span class="hl">2!</span>'},
  {img:IM.minnie,nc:'mi',nl:'🎀 Mina',ak:'n3',
   html:'E a diversão começa às <span class="hl">13 horas!</span> 🎉💫<br>Uma festa cheia de brincadeiras e surpresas!'},
  {img:IM.mickey,nc:'mk',nl:'🎩 Mickey',ak:'m4',
   html:'Prepare-se, amiguinho…<br>você está <span class="hl">oficialmente convidado!</span> 🥳'},
  {img:IM.minnie,nc:'mi',nl:'🎀 Mina',ak:'n4',
   html:'Venha comemorar os <span class="hl">4 aninhos da Eloá</span> com a gente! 💕🎂'},
  {img:IM.duo,nc:'bo',nl:'🐭 Mickey &amp; Mina',ak:'m5',next:'s5',
   html:'<span class="hl">Esperamos você lá! Ha-ha!</span> 🎀🎊✨'},
];

let curSC=[],scIdx=0,unlocked=false,safeT=null,curAK=null;

function mkDots(total,cur){
  const w=document.getElementById('dots');w.innerHTML='';
  for(let i=0;i<total;i++){
    const d=document.createElement('div');
    d.className='dot'+(i<cur?' d':i===cur?' a':'');
    w.appendChild(d);
  }
}
function unlockBtn(){
  if(unlocked)return;unlocked=true;
  document.getElementById('cphoto').classList.remove('talk');
  document.getElementById('wv').classList.remove('on');
  document.getElementById('btnProx').classList.add('on');
  document.getElementById('btnReplay').style.display='block';
}
function replayScene(){
  if(!curAK)return;
  stopChar();
  playChar(curAK,null);
}
function showScene(sc,idx){
  unlocked=false;
  if(safeT){clearTimeout(safeT);safeT=null;}
  stopChar();
  const s=sc[idx];
  curAK=s.ak;
  document.getElementById('cphoto').className='cphoto talk';
  document.getElementById('cimg').src=s.img;
  const bub=document.getElementById('bub');
  bub.classList.remove('show');
  document.getElementById('bn').className='bn '+s.nc;
  document.getElementById('bn').innerHTML=s.nl;
  document.getElementById('bt').innerHTML=s.html;
  setTimeout(()=>bub.classList.add('show'),80);
  document.getElementById('wv').classList.add('on');
  const bp=document.getElementById('btnProx');
  bp.classList.remove('on');
  bp.dataset.next=s.next||'';
  bp.textContent=s.next==='s4'?'Aceitar missão! 🕵️':s.next==='s5'?'Confirmar presença 🎀':'Próximo ›';
  document.getElementById('btnReplay').style.display='none';
  mkDots(sc.length,idx);
  playChar(s.ak,unlockBtn);
  safeT=setTimeout(unlockBtn,9000);
}
function startCinema(sc,idx){
  curSC=sc;scIdx=idx;
  goTo('s3');
  setTimeout(()=>showScene(curSC,scIdx),350);
}
function nextScene(){
  if(!unlocked)return;
  stopChar();
  if(safeT){clearTimeout(safeT);safeT=null;}
  const dest=document.getElementById('btnProx').dataset.next;
  if(dest==='s4'){goTo('s4');return;}
  if(dest==='s5'){goTo('s5');return;}
  scIdx++;
  if(scIdx<curSC.length)showScene(curSC,scIdx);
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════
// QUIZ
// ══════════════════════════════════════
function ans(el,ok){
  document.querySelectorAll('.qo').forEach(b=>b.style.pointerEvents='none');
  const fb=document.getElementById('qfb');
  if(ok){
    el.classList.add('ok');
    fb.textContent='🎉 Acertou! É Maio! Ha-ha!';
    fb.style.color='#4caf50';fb.classList.add('on');
    setTimeout(()=>startCinema(SC2,0),1800);
  }else{
    el.classList.add('no');
    fb.textContent='😬 Hmm… pensa no mês mais florido!';
    fb.style.color='#ff6b6b';fb.classList.add('on');
    setTimeout(()=>{
      document.querySelectorAll('.qo').forEach(b=>{b.style.pointerEvents='';b.classList.remove('ok','no');});
      fb.classList.remove('on');
    },2000);
  }
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════
// RSVP
// ══════════════════════════════════════
function cQty(d){const el=document.getElementById('qty');el.value=Math.max(1,Math.min(20,(parseInt(el.value)||1)+d));}
function getG(){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('eloa26')||'[]');}catch(e){return[];}}
function saveG(g){const l=getG();l.push(g);try{localStorage.setItem('eloa26',JSON.stringify(l));}catch(e){}}
function renderChips(){
  const l=getG();const w=document.getElementById('gchips');w.innerHTML='';
  if(!l.length){w.innerHTML='<span style="color:#444;font-size:.76rem">Seja o primeiro! 🎀</span>';return;}
  l.slice(-10).forEach(g=>{const c=document.createElement('div');c.className='chip';c.innerHTML=`<div class="cdot"></div>${g.child||g.name}`;w.appendChild(c);});
}
function doRSVP(){
  const name=document.getElementById('fn').value.trim();
  const child=document.getElementById('cn').value.trim();
  const qty=document.getElementById('qty').value;
  const att=document.getElementById('att').value;
  const msg=document.getElementById('rmsg').value.trim();
  if(!name){alert('Informe seu nome!');return;}
  if(!child){alert('Informe o nome da criança!');return;}
  if(!att){alert('Selecione se vai comparecer!');return;}
  saveG({name,child,qty,att,msg});
  const sf=child.toLowerCase().endsWith('a')?'a':'o';
  document.getElementById('okNm').textContent=`🎀 ${child} confirmad${sf}!`;
  const ms={sim:`Que maravilha, ${name}! A Eloá vai ficar super feliz! Até 02/05 às 13h 🎊`,talvez:`Tudo bem, ${name}! Esperamos que consigam vir 💕`,nao:`Que pena, ${name}! A Eloá vai sentir falta 🎀`};
  document.getElementById('okMsg').textContent=ms[att]||ms.sim;
  renderChips();spawnConf();goTo('s6');
}
function spawnConf(){
  const w=document.getElementById('cfw');w.innerHTML='';
  const cols=['#d91a35','#FFD700','#f97fb0','#fff','#a81228'];
  for(let i=0;i<70;i++){const c=document.createElement('div');c.className='cp';c.style.cssText=`left:${Math.random()*100}%;background:${cols[i%5]};width:${5+Math.random()*9}px;height:${5+Math.random()*9}px;border-radius:${Math.random()>.5?'50%':'2px'};animation-duration:${2+Math.random()*4}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*2.5}s`;w.appendChild(c);}
}
function shareIt(){
  if(navigator.share){navigator.share({title:'🎀 Festa da Eloá!',text:'Você está convidado! 🎉',url:location.href}).catch(()=>{});}
  else{try{navigator.clipboard.writeText(location.href);}catch(e){}alert('Link copiado! 🎀');}
}
</script>

</body>
</html>
